command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.203 '
set -e
echo === STEP 1: TURN OFF SWAP ===
sudo swapoff -a
echo OK_SWAPOFF

echo === STEP 2: REPARTITION — delete sda3, expand sda2 to end ===
# Use fdisk non-interactively via printf
# Delete partition 3, delete partition 2, recreate partition 2 from same start to end of disk
printf "d\n3\nd\n2\nn\n2\n2000896\n\n\nw\n" | sudo fdisk /dev/sda 2>&1 | tail -15

echo === STEP 3: INFORM KERNEL ===
sudo partprobe /dev/sda 2>&1 || sudo partx -u /dev/sda 2>&1
sleep 2
lsblk /dev/sda

echo === STEP 4: GROW FILESYSTEM ===
sudo resize2fs /dev/sda2 2>&1 | tail -5

echo === STEP 5: VERIFY ===
df -h /
lsblk /dev/sda

echo === STEP 6: CREATE SWAPFILE ===
sudo fallocate -l 4G /swapfile
sudo chmod 600 /swapfile
sudo mkswap /swapfile
sudo swapon /swapfile
echo "/swapfile none swap sw 0 0" | sudo tee -a /etc/fstab
free -h | grep Swap

echo ALL_DONE
' 2>&1
